name: Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes missed discounts and supplier penalties. We automate compliance reporting instead of manual tracking and reporting using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in generating accurate monthly spend compliance reports from raw procurement data.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in generating accurate monthly spend compliance reports from raw procurement data.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes missed discounts and supplier penalties. We automate compliance reporting instead of manual tracking and reporting using spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking and reporting using spreadsheets.
